sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101392" key="su/spondos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύσπονδος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n101392.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὁμόσπονδος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:163" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.163</biblScope> </bibl> (pl., v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
